SA1.justification: Stub flags PDF-not-yet-pulled and lists open verification items, but reads as a finished resources/ entry rather than a triage artifact inviting pushback on the routing itself.

SA2.justification: Has a dedicated 'Provenance' section in the stub naming research-assistant origin and 'second-hand until PDF is read' — a structural marker; daybook log carries it in prose only.

SA3.justification: Hedged — added an unverified caveat but accepted the implied 'this is reference material' framing without naming the disagreement that TLDR ≠ source for routing purposes.

SA4.justification: Raised the unverified-figure concern (the 73% number, 'second-hand until the PDF is read') but did not name the class — and the act of filing it in resources/ partially undercuts the signal.
